cases.description: Reject Preview3 packets whose declared meta_len and body_len do not match the actual byte shape on the wire.
Reject Preview3 SESSION_OPEN fixed metadata that sets reserved fields or non-frozen bits instead of sending them as zero.
Reject Preview3 SESSION_OPEN_ACK fixed metadata that sets reserved fields or unknown session_flags_ack bits outside the frozen public mask.
Reject Preview3 FLOW_UPDATE metadata when reserved flow_flags bits 4-31 are set instead of cleared on the wire.
